channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Plant-based traditional food in Zimbabwe
item.description: via DW.com #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews

item.title: MCAZ engages content creators over medicine ads @zimsituation
item.description: Source: MCAZ engages content creators over medicine ads – herald Rumbidzayi Zinyuke-Senior Health Reporter THE Medicines Control Authority of Zimbabwe wants content creators and social media influencers to comply with medicine advertising regulations amid growing concerns over th via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: ‘Governance issues in State enterprises, parastatals decline 29pc’ @zimsituation
item.description: Source: ‘Governance issues in State enterprises, parastatals decline 29pc’ – herald Farirai Machivenyika-Senior Reporter GOVERNANCE-RELATED irregularities in State-owned enterprises and parastatals declined 29 percent last year as compliance with corporate governance standards im via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: ‘Opaque tenders are draining Zimbabwe’
item.description: Hazel Marimbizain BULAWAYO THE widespread manipulation of public contracts through opaque bidding and weak oversight is stifling national development and draining the... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of yo via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Zimbabwe completes requirements for duty-free access to Chinese market
item.description: Xinhua Zimbabwe has completed all requirements to enjoy duty-free access to the Chinese market for qualifying products, the national trade promotion organization ZimTrade has said. According to ZimTrade, Zimbabwean exporters can now obtain the required Certificate of Origin from via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe crush Bangladesh by 32 Runs to continue winning streak
item.description: Zimbabwe’s senior men’s cricket team made a winning start to the three-match T20 International series after defeating Bangladesh by 32 runs at Queens Sports Club on Wednesday. The victory gives the Chevrons a 1-0 lead in the series, with two matches still to be played. After losi via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Least paid mine worker to earn US$418 as new wage agreement takes effect

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
